description: During a game, a VIP suite holder requests extra chairs for their suite.

nodes.task_description: Receive the request from the suite holder via the venue's mobile app.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the request, including the suite number and number of chairs needed.

nodes.task_description: Check the inventory of available chairs.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms there are enough chairs in storage.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a member of the event staff to deliver the chairs to the suite.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a task for the event staff and dispatches it to the nearest staff member.
